pi_items.source: Confirmed by analyzing setup_task.sh which creates the workspace at this path.
Analyzed generate_data.py in setup_task.sh. test_01 is a copy of the reference. test_02 misses 1 component. test_03 misses 2 components.
Examined the generated python source files in setup_task.sh and confirmed all 4 bugs are explicitly planted in utils.py and core.py.

privileged_info_summary: The project is located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/pcb_inspector. The data is synthetically generated with test_01.jpg having 0 defects, test_02.jpg having 1 defect, and test_03.jpg having 2 defects. There are 4 bugs intentionally planted in the code: incorrect ROI slicing indices, a mutable default argument in log_defect, an IndexError when checking grayscale image shape, and inverted threshold logic for defect detection.
